---
title: "Investment Stability Analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Supplementary/TransporterInvestment/Investment_Stability/")
############################################################
# 0) LOAD RETAINED DATA (CSV exports from QC pipeline)
#    Then reproduce transporter vs non-transporter pie charts
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
})

# ---- Load
protein_final          <- read_csv("../../../Figure_04/Data_Filtration/retained_protein_table.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
retained_species       <- read_csv("../../../Figure_04/Data_Filtration/retained_species.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
retained_species_dates <- read_csv("../../../Figure_04/Data_Filtration/retained_species_dates.csv",    show_col_types = FALSE)
species_taxonomy <- read_csv("../../../../Data/Species_Data/Final_Data/Species_Table.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

species_taxonomy <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species) %>%
  distinct()

# ---- Basic cleanup / checks
protein_final <- protein_final %>% mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))
retained_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>% mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

stopifnot(
  all(c("Species_ID","Protein_ID","Date","Group_For_Plots") %in% names(protein_final)),
  all(c("Species_ID","Date","Group_For_Plots") %in% names(retained_species_dates))
)

cat("\n=== Loaded retained datasets ===\n")
cat("protein_final rows:", nrow(protein_final), "\n")
cat("retained species×dates:", nrow(retained_species_dates), "\n")
cat("retained species:", nrow(retained_species), "\n")

glimpse(protein_final)
glimpse(retained_species)
glimpse(retained_species_dates)
glimpse(species_taxonomy)
```

# distribution overview
```{r}
############################################################
# Supplementary Figure 1
# Distributional properties of transporter responses
#
# Panel A:
#   species-level mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)
#   on the raw 0-1 scale with fine binning and a rug layer
#   to show that analysed values remain inside the open
#   interval and do not occur exactly at 0 or 1.
#
# Panel B:
#   species-level mean transporter Bray-Curtis dissimilarity
#   after logit transformation, shown on the analysis scale
#   used for Gaussian modelling.
#
# IMPORTANT:
#   Bray-Curtis is calculated between consecutive dates in the
#   filtered retained date series for each species
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(vegan)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
})

set.seed(1)

############################################################
# 1) SETTINGS
############################################################

out_dir <- "Supplementary_ModelChoice"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

fig_width  <- 10
fig_height <- 7
dpi_out    <- 300

min_valid_dates_per_species <- 5
eps <- 1e-6

fill_hist <- "grey84"
col_trans <- "#3C78B5"

# Finer TPF bins to make internal support visually obvious
tpf_binwidth <- 0.025

############################################################
# 2) BASIC CHECKS
############################################################

stopifnot(
  exists("protein_final"),
  exists("retained_species"),
  exists("retained_species_dates"),
  exists("species_taxonomy")
)

required_protein_cols <- c(
  "Species_ID", "Protein_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots",
  "TrophicIndex", "Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm",
  "KEGG_Subcategory", "KEGG_ID"
)

required_species_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")
required_species_date_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots")
required_tax_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Phylum", "Class")

stopifnot(all(required_protein_cols %in% names(protein_final)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_cols %in% names(retained_species)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_date_cols %in% names(retained_species_dates)))
stopifnot(all(required_tax_cols %in% names(species_taxonomy)))

species_taxonomy_use <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class) %>%
  distinct()

############################################################
# 3) HELPERS
############################################################

theme_nat <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

logit_bounded <- function(x, eps = 1e-6) {
  x2 <- pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  qlogis(x2)
}

############################################################
# 4) SPECIES-LEVEL MEAN TPF
############################################################

protein_flagged <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) &
      str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b"),
    abund = Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm
  )

species_date_tpf <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    abund_total = sum(abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    abund_trans = sum(abund[is_transporter], na.rm = TRUE),
    TPF = abund_trans / abund_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TPF),
    abund_total > 0,
    TPF > 0,
    TPF < 1
  )

species_traits <- protein_final %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots)

species_tpf_df <- species_date_tpf %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_dates  = n(),
    mean_TPF = mean(TPF, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_dates >= min_valid_dates_per_species,
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_TPF),
    mean_TPF > 0,
    mean_TPF < 1,
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  )

############################################################
# 5) SPECIES-LEVEL MEAN TRANSPORTER BRAY-CURTIS
############################################################

analysis_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  semi_join(retained_species, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Group_For_Plots, TrophicIndex, Phylum, Class) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Species_ID, Date)

kegg_sd_trans <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(KEGG_ID),
    !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory),
    str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    kegg_abund = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(kegg_abund), kegg_abund > 0)

compute_species_transitions_bc <- function(sp_id, keep_tbl, kegg_tbl) {

  dates_tbl <- keep_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id) %>%
    arrange(Date)

  dates <- dates_tbl$Date
  if (length(dates) < 2) return(NULL)

  mat_wide <- kegg_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date %in% dates) %>%
    mutate(Date_chr = as.character(Date)) %>%
    select(Date_chr, KEGG_ID, kegg_abund) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = KEGG_ID,
      values_from = kegg_abund,
      values_fill = 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(Date_chr)

  if (nrow(mat_wide) < 2 || ncol(mat_wide) < 2) return(NULL)

  present_dates_chr <- mat_wide$Date_chr
  present_dates <- as.Date(present_dates_chr)

  M_abs <- as.matrix(mat_wide %>% select(-Date_chr))
  rownames(M_abs) <- present_dates_chr

  pair_tbl <- tibble(
    Date1 = present_dates[-length(present_dates)],
    Date2 = present_dates[-1]
  )

  out <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_tbl)), function(i) {
    d1 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date1[i])
    d2 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date2[i])

    bc_abs <- as.numeric(
      vegan::vegdist(
        M_abs[c(d1, d2), , drop = FALSE],
        method = "bray"
      )
    )

    tibble(
      Species_ID = sp_id,
      Date1 = as.Date(d1),
      Date2 = as.Date(d2),
      bc_abs = bc_abs
    )
  })

  bind_rows(out)
}

all_species <- sort(unique(analysis_species_dates$Species_ID))

transitions <- bind_rows(lapply(
  all_species,
  compute_species_transitions_bc,
  keep_tbl = analysis_species_dates,
  kegg_tbl = kegg_sd_trans
)) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>%
      distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, Phylum, Class),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(bc_abs),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  )

species_bc_df <- transitions %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_transitions = n(),
    mean_bc_abs   = mean(bc_abs, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_bc_abs),
    mean_bc_abs >= 0,
    mean_bc_abs <= 1,
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_bc_abs_logit = logit_bounded(mean_bc_abs, eps = eps)
  )

############################################################
# 6) PANEL A — TPF RAW DISTRIBUTION
############################################################

n_tpf <- nrow(species_tpf_df)
n_bc  <- nrow(species_bc_df)

p_a <- ggplot(species_tpf_df, aes(x = mean_TPF)) +
  geom_histogram(
    aes(y = after_stat(density)),
    binwidth = tpf_binwidth,
    boundary = 0,
    fill = fill_hist,
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_density(
    linewidth = 0.9,
    adjust = 0.9,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  geom_rug(
    sides = "b",
    alpha = 0.20,
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(0, 1),
    linetype = 3,
    linewidth = 0.4,
    colour = "grey45"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0.08,
    y = max(hist(
      species_tpf_df$mean_TPF,
      plot = FALSE,
      breaks = seq(0, 1, by = tpf_binwidth)
    )$density) * 1.08,
    label = "exact 0 = 0, exact 1 = 0",
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.3
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.02, 1.02)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "A. TPF | beta model",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Species-level mean transporter proteome fraction (n = ", n_tpf, ")"
    ),
    x = "Mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

############################################################
# 7) PANEL B — LOGIT-TRANSFORMED BRAY-CURTIS
############################################################

p_b <- ggplot(species_bc_df, aes(x = mean_bc_abs_logit)) +
  geom_histogram(
    aes(y = after_stat(density)),
    bins = 18,
    fill = fill_hist,
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_density(
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.9,
    adjust = 0.9
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Bray–Curtis | Gaussian model on logit scale",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Species-level mean transporter Bray–Curtis dissimilarity after logit transformation (n = ",
      n_bc, ")"
    ),
    x = "logit(mean Bray–Curtis dissimilarity)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

############################################################
# 8) COMBINE FIGURE
############################################################

supp_fig1 <- (p_a | p_b) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Distributional properties of transporter responses"
  ) &
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9.5)
  )

print(supp_fig1)

############################################################
# 9) SAVE OUTPUTS
############################################################

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_Fig1_ResponseDistributions_ModelChoice_updated.png"),
  plot = supp_fig1,
  width = fig_width,
  height = fig_height,
  dpi = dpi_out,
  bg = "white"
)

############################################################
# 10) SAVE SUMMARY TABLE
############################################################

fig1_summary <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    Response = "Species-level mean TPF",
    n = n_tpf,
    min = min(species_tpf_df$mean_TPF, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(species_tpf_df$mean_TPF, na.rm = TRUE),
    exact_0 = sum(species_tpf_df$mean_TPF == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    exact_1 = sum(species_tpf_df$mean_TPF == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    analysis_scale = "raw 0-1 scale",
    candidate_family = "beta"
  ),
  tibble(
    Response = "Species-level mean transporter Bray-Curtis",
    n = n_bc,
    min = min(species_bc_df$mean_bc_abs, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(species_bc_df$mean_bc_abs, na.rm = TRUE),
    exact_0 = sum(species_bc_df$mean_bc_abs == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    exact_1 = sum(species_bc_df$mean_bc_abs == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    analysis_scale = "logit-transformed scale",
    candidate_family = "Gaussian after logit transform"
  )
)

write.csv(
  fig1_summary,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_Fig1_ResponseDistributions_ModelChoice_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

print(fig1_summary)
```

# QC table
```{r}
############################################################
# Supplementary Figure S2 and Supplementary Table S1
# Primary species-level model adequacy checks
#
# This script performs only two tasks:
#
#   1) Figure S2
#      Creates a minimal two-panel diagnostic figure showing
#      DHARMa scaled residuals versus fitted values for the
#      primary species-level models:
#        - mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)
#        - mean transporter Bray-Curtis dissimilarity
#
#   2) Table S1
#      Creates a compact QC table containing only model
#      adequacy and numerical stability metrics:
#        - DHARMa uniformity test
#        - DHARMa dispersion test
#        - DHARMa outlier test
#        - maximum VIF
#        - singular fit check
#        - positive-definite Hessian
#
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(vegan)
  library(glmmTMB)
  library(DHARMa)
  library(performance)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
  library(gt)
})

set.seed(1)

############################################################
# 1) SETTINGS
############################################################

out_dir <- "Supplementary_ModelQC"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

fig_width  <- 12
fig_height <- 4
dpi_out    <- 300

# Species-level summaries are built from the retained
# species-date universe. For TPF, at least 5 retained dates
# are required to match the main species-level workflow.
min_valid_dates_per_species <- 5

# Small epsilon for bounded logit transformation of Bray-Curtis
eps <- 1e-6

############################################################
# 2) BASIC CHECKS
############################################################

stopifnot(
  exists("protein_final"),
  exists("retained_species"),
  exists("retained_species_dates"),
  exists("species_taxonomy")
)

required_protein_cols <- c(
  "Species_ID", "Protein_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots",
  "TrophicIndex", "Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm",
  "KEGG_Subcategory", "KEGG_ID"
)

required_species_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")
required_species_date_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots")
required_tax_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Phylum", "Class")

stopifnot(all(required_protein_cols %in% names(protein_final)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_cols %in% names(retained_species)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_date_cols %in% names(retained_species_dates)))
stopifnot(all(required_tax_cols %in% names(species_taxonomy)))

species_taxonomy_use <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class) %>%
  distinct()

############################################################
# 3) HELPERS
############################################################

theme_nat <- function(base_size = 10.5) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

# Bounded logit transform to avoid infinities if a response
# falls extremely close to 0 or 1.
logit_bounded <- function(x, eps = 1e-6) {
  x2 <- pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  qlogis(x2)
}

# Simple z-scaling helper for model covariates
scale_z <- function(x) {
  as.numeric(scale(x))
}

# Numeric formatting helpers for QC tables
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "NA", formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "fg", flag = "#"))
}

fmt_p <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x), "NA",
    ifelse(x < 0.001, "<0.001", formatC(x, digits = 3, format = "fg", flag = "#"))
  )
}

############################################################
# 4) BUILD SPECIES-LEVEL TPF DATA
############################################################
# Transporter proteome fraction is calculated per retained
# species-date as transporter signal divided by total signal,
# then averaged to one species-level value. Coverage
# covariates are retained because they are part of the
# primary species-level model specification.

protein_flagged <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) &
      str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b"),
    abund = Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm
  )

species_date_qc <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

species_date_tpf <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    abund_total = sum(abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    abund_trans = sum(abund[is_transporter], na.rm = TRUE),
    TPF = abund_trans / abund_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(species_date_qc, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TPF),
    abund_total > 0,
    TPF > 0,
    TPF < 1
  )

species_traits <- protein_final %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots)

model_df_tpf <- species_date_tpf %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_dates            = n(),
    mean_TPF           = mean(TPF, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prot_detected = mean(N_prot_detected, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_dates >= min_valid_dates_per_species,
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_TPF),
    mean_TPF > 0,
    mean_TPF < 1,
    is.finite(mean_prot_detected),
    mean_prot_detected > 0,
    !is.na(Phylum)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z      = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    n_dates_z           = scale_z(n_dates),
    log_prot_detected_z = scale_z(log1p(mean_prot_detected))
  )

############################################################
# 5) BUILD SPECIES-LEVEL BRAY-CURTIS DATA
############################################################
# Bray-Curtis is calculated from transporter-only KEGG
# profiles. For each species, retained dates are ordered, and
# dissimilarity is computed only between adjacent dates in
# that filtered sequence. No explicit minimum-transition
# filter is imposed here; this matches the harmonized
# species-level Bray-Curtis workflow.

analysis_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  semi_join(retained_species, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Group_For_Plots, TrophicIndex, Phylum, Class) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(Phylum)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Species_ID, Date)

# Per-date protein counts are retained as a coverage proxy
# for pairwise Bray-Curtis summaries.
prot_counts <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% dplyr::select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

analysis_species_dates <- analysis_species_dates %>%
  left_join(prot_counts, by = c("Species_ID", "Date"))

# Build transporter-only KEGG abundance profiles:
# one summed intensity per Species × Date × KEGG_ID
kegg_sd_trans <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% dplyr::select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(KEGG_ID),
    !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory),
    str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    kegg_abund = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(kegg_abund), kegg_abund > 0)

compute_species_transitions_bc <- function(sp_id, keep_tbl, kegg_tbl) {

  dates_tbl <- keep_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id) %>%
    arrange(Date)

  dates <- dates_tbl$Date
  if (length(dates) < 2) return(NULL)

  mat_wide <- kegg_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date %in% dates) %>%
    mutate(Date_chr = as.character(Date)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Date_chr, KEGG_ID, kegg_abund) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = KEGG_ID,
      values_from = kegg_abund,
      values_fill = 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(Date_chr)

  # If fewer than two profile rows remain, or no KEGG feature
  # columns are available, Bray-Curtis cannot be computed.
  if (nrow(mat_wide) < 2 || ncol(mat_wide) < 2) return(NULL)

  present_dates_chr <- mat_wide$Date_chr
  present_dates <- as.Date(present_dates_chr)

  M_abs <- as.matrix(mat_wide %>% dplyr::select(-Date_chr))
  rownames(M_abs) <- present_dates_chr

  # Consecutive pairs are defined within the filtered retained
  # species-specific date sequence, not by strict calendar adjacency.
  pair_tbl <- tibble(
    Date1 = present_dates[-length(present_dates)],
    Date2 = present_dates[-1]
  )

  out <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_tbl)), function(i) {
    d1 <- pair_tbl$Date1[i]
    d2 <- pair_tbl$Date2[i]

    bc_abs <- as.numeric(
      vegan::vegdist(
        M_abs[c(as.character(d1), as.character(d2)), , drop = FALSE],
        method = "bray"
      )
    )

    nd1 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == d1) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    nd2 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == d2) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    tibble(
      Species_ID  = sp_id,
      Date1       = d1,
      Date2       = d2,
      bc_abs      = bc_abs,
      N_prot_pair = mean(c(nd1, nd2), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  })

  bind_rows(out)
}

all_species <- sort(unique(analysis_species_dates$Species_ID))

transitions <- bind_rows(lapply(
  all_species,
  compute_species_transitions_bc,
  keep_tbl = analysis_species_dates,
  kegg_tbl = kegg_sd_trans
)) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>%
      distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, Phylum, Class),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(bc_abs),
    is.finite(N_prot_pair),
    !is.na(Phylum)
  )

model_df_bc <- transitions %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_transitions  = n(),
    mean_bc_abs    = mean(bc_abs, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prot_pair = mean(N_prot_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_bc_abs),
    mean_bc_abs >= 0,
    mean_bc_abs <= 1,
    is.finite(mean_prot_pair),
    mean_prot_pair > 0,
    !is.na(Phylum)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_bc_abs_logit = logit_bounded(mean_bc_abs, eps = eps),
    TrophicIndex_z    = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    log_prot_pair_z   = scale_z(log1p(mean_prot_pair))
  )

############################################################
# 6) FIT PRIMARY SPECIES-LEVEL MODELS
############################################################
# These are the primary species-level models whose adequacy
# is evaluated here. The goal is not model comparison, but
# validation of the chosen model classes.
#
# TPF model:
#   beta response on the raw 0-1 scale
# BC model:
#   Gaussian model on logit-transformed mean Bray-Curtis
#
# Coverage covariates are retained, but no explicit
# transition-count covariate is included in the Bray-Curtis
# model, keeping the formulation aligned with the harmonized
# workflow.

m_tpf <- glmmTMB(
  mean_TPF ~ TrophicIndex_z + n_dates_z + log_prot_detected_z + (1 | Phylum),
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  data = model_df_tpf
)

m_bc <- glmmTMB(
  mean_bc_abs_logit ~ TrophicIndex_z + log_prot_pair_z + (1 | Phylum),
  family = gaussian(),
  data = model_df_bc
)

############################################################
# 7) DHARMa RESIDUALS
############################################################

sim_tpf <- simulateResiduals(m_tpf, n = 1000)
sim_bc  <- simulateResiduals(m_bc,  n = 1000)

diag_tpf <- tibble(
  fitted = predict(m_tpf, type = "response"),
  resid  = sim_tpf$scaledResiduals
)

diag_bc <- tibble(
  fitted = predict(m_bc, type = "response"),
  resid  = sim_bc$scaledResiduals
)

############################################################
# 8) FIGURE S2 — RESIDUAL DIAGNOSTICS
############################################################
# Uniformly distributed DHARMa residuals should not show
# strong structure across the fitted-value range. The dashed
# smoother is included as a visual guide only.

p_tpf <- ggplot(diag_tpf, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.75, colour = "black") +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "loess",
    formula = y ~ x,
    se = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.0,
    linetype = 2,
    colour = "grey20",
    span = 1.0
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.5,
    linetype = 3,
    linewidth = 0.4,
    colour = "grey45"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
    labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "A. TPF beta model",
    subtitle = "DHARMa residuals versus fitted values",
    x = "Fitted mean TPF",
    y = "Scaled residual"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

p_bc <- ggplot(diag_bc, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.75, colour = "black") +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "loess",
    formula = y ~ x,
    se = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.0,
    linetype = 2,
    colour = "grey20",
    span = 1.0
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.5,
    linetype = 3,
    linewidth = 0.4,
    colour = "grey45"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
    labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Bray–Curtis Gaussian model",
    subtitle = "DHARMa residuals versus fitted values",
    x = "Fitted logit(mean Bray–Curtis)",
    y = "Scaled residual"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

fig_s2 <- p_tpf | p_bc

print(fig_s2)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Fig_S2_residual_diagnostics.png"),
  plot = fig_s2,
  width = fig_width,
  height = fig_height,
  dpi = dpi_out,
  bg = "white"
)

############################################################
# 9) TABLE S1 — PURE QC METRICS
############################################################
# Only adequacy and numerical stability metrics are reported:
#   - DHARMa uniformity
#   - DHARMa dispersion
#   - DHARMa outliers
#   - maximum VIF
#   - singular fit
#   - positive-definite Hessian
#
# Model coefficients, p-values, effect sizes, and R² are not
# included here because they belong in the model summary /
# robustness tables rather than a QC table.

ks_tpf   <- testUniformity(sim_tpf)
disp_tpf <- testDispersion(sim_tpf)
out_tpf  <- testOutliers(sim_tpf)

ks_bc    <- testUniformity(sim_bc)
disp_bc  <- testDispersion(sim_bc)
out_bc   <- testOutliers(sim_bc)

col_tpf  <- check_collinearity(m_tpf)
col_bc   <- check_collinearity(m_bc)

sing_tpf <- check_singularity(m_tpf)
sing_bc  <- check_singularity(m_bc)

qc_table_raw <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "N",
    "DHARMa uniformity p",
    "DHARMa dispersion p",
    "DHARMa outlier p",
    "Maximum VIF",
    "Singular fit",
    "Positive-definite Hessian"
  ),
  `TPF model` = c(
    as.character(nrow(model_df_tpf)),
    fmt_p(ks_tpf$p.value),
    fmt_p(disp_tpf$p.value),
    fmt_p(out_tpf$p.value),
    fmt_num(max(col_tpf$VIF, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    as.character(sing_tpf),
    as.character(m_tpf$sdr$pdHess)
  ),
  `Bray-Curtis model` = c(
    as.character(nrow(model_df_bc)),
    fmt_p(ks_bc$p.value),
    fmt_p(disp_bc$p.value),
    fmt_p(out_bc$p.value),
    fmt_num(max(col_bc$VIF, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    as.character(sing_bc),
    as.character(m_bc$sdr$pdHess)
  )
)

write.csv(
  qc_table_raw,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "Table_S1_model_adequacy_metrics.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

print(qc_table_raw)

############################################################
# 10) RENDERED GT TABLE S1
############################################################

table_s1_gt <- qc_table_raw %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Model adequacy diagnostics**"),
    subtitle = "Primary species-level models for transporter allocation and variability"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = Metric
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(`TPF model`, `Bray-Curtis model`)
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Metric = "",
    `TPF model` = "TPF (beta)",
    `Bray-Curtis model` = "Bray–Curtis (Gaussian)"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Metric ~ px(280),
    `TPF model` ~ px(190),
    `Bray-Curtis model` ~ px(220)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(11),
    data_row.padding = px(6),
    column_labels.font.size = px(11),
    heading.title.font.size = px(13),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(10),
    source_notes.font.size = px(9),
    table.width = px(1050)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md(
      "Uniformity, dispersion, and outlier rows report DHARMa test p-values. Higher p-values indicate no evidence for model misspecification; low maximum VIF indicates low collinearity; non-singular fits with positive-definite Hessians indicate numerical stability."
    )
  )

print(table_s1_gt)

gtsave(
  table_s1_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Table_S1_model_adequacy_diagnostics.png"),
  vwidth = 1200,
  vheight = 1100
)

gtsave(
  table_s1_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Table_S1_model_adequacy_diagnostics.html")
)
```

# correlation with trophic index
```{r}
############################################################
# Supplementary model figure and model summary table
#
# This script:
#   1) rebuilds the species-level response datasets
#   2) fits the primary species-level models
#   3) plots the model-implied fits against trophic index
#   4) exports a compact model summary table
#
# Figure panels:
#   A) trophic-index coverage across retained species
#   B) species-level mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)
#      with fitted beta-model mean response
#   C) species-level mean transporter Bray-Curtis dissimilarity
#      with fitted Gaussian-model mean response, shown on the
#      raw Bray-Curtis scale after inverse-logit transformation
#
# IMPORTANT UPDATE
#   The Bray-Curtis workflow is harmonized with the revised
#   species-level analyses:
#     - transporter-only KEGG intensity profiles
#     - Bray-Curtis between consecutive dates within the
#       filtered retained series for each species
#     - no explicit minimum-transition filter
#     - no transition-count covariate in the primary model
#
# Expected objects already loaded in memory:
#   protein_final
#   retained_species
#   retained_species_dates
#   species_taxonomy
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(vegan)
  library(glmmTMB)
  library(performance)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
  library(gt)
})

set.seed(1)

############################################################
# 1) SETTINGS
############################################################

out_dir <- "Supplementary_ModelFits"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

fig_width  <- 12
fig_height <- 7
dpi_out    <- 300

# TPF summaries are retained only for species with at least
# 5 valid retained dates, matching the main species-level
# workflow.
min_valid_dates_per_species <- 5

# Small epsilon for bounded logit transformation
eps <- 1e-6

trophic_cols <- c(
  "Oligotroph"   = "#99C3E6",
  "Intermediate" = "#ECEAE9",
  "Copiotroph"   = "#B25009"
)

############################################################
# 2) BASIC CHECKS
############################################################

stopifnot(
  exists("protein_final"),
  exists("retained_species"),
  exists("retained_species_dates"),
  exists("species_taxonomy")
)

required_protein_cols <- c(
  "Species_ID", "Protein_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots",
  "TrophicIndex", "Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm",
  "KEGG_Subcategory", "KEGG_ID"
)

required_species_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")
required_species_date_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots")
required_tax_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Phylum", "Class")

stopifnot(all(required_protein_cols %in% names(protein_final)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_cols %in% names(retained_species)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_date_cols %in% names(retained_species_dates)))
stopifnot(all(required_tax_cols %in% names(species_taxonomy)))

species_taxonomy_use <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class) %>%
  distinct()

############################################################
# 3) HELPERS
############################################################

theme_nat <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.key = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

recode_plot_group <- function(x) {
  out <- dplyr::case_when(
    x == "Oligo_like"   ~ "Oligotroph",
    x == "Copio_like"   ~ "Copiotroph",
    x == "Intermediate" ~ "Intermediate",
    TRUE                ~ NA_character_
  )
  factor(out, levels = c("Oligotroph", "Intermediate", "Copiotroph"))
}

logit_bounded <- function(x, eps = 1e-6) {
  x2 <- pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  qlogis(x2)
}

inv_logit <- function(x) {
  plogis(x)
}

scale_z <- function(x) {
  as.numeric(scale(x))
}

fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "NA", formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "fg", flag = "#"))
}

fmt_p <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x), "NA",
    ifelse(x < 0.001, "<0.001", formatC(x, digits = 3, format = "fg", flag = "#"))
  )
}

extract_fixed_effect <- function(model, term_name = "TrophicIndex_z") {
  sm <- summary(model)$coefficients$cond
  if (!term_name %in% rownames(sm)) {
    return(tibble(
      estimate = NA_real_,
      std_error = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  tibble(
    estimate  = unname(sm[term_name, "Estimate"]),
    std_error = unname(sm[term_name, "Std. Error"]),
    p_value   = unname(sm[term_name, "Pr(>|z|)"])
  )
}

safe_numeric <- function(x) {
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  if (length(out) == 0 || all(is.na(out))) NA_real_ else out[1]
}

############################################################
# 4) BUILD SPECIES-LEVEL TPF DATA
############################################################
# Transporter proteome fraction is calculated per retained
# species-date as transporter signal divided by total signal,
# then summarized to one species-level mean.

protein_flagged <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) &
      str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b"),
    abund = Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm
  )

species_date_qc <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

species_date_tpf <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    abund_total = sum(abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    abund_trans = sum(abund[is_transporter], na.rm = TRUE),
    TPF = abund_trans / abund_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(species_date_qc, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TPF),
    abund_total > 0,
    TPF > 0,
    TPF < 1
  )

species_traits <- protein_final %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots)

species_tpf_df <- species_date_tpf %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(TrophicGroupPlot = recode_plot_group(Group_For_Plots)) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_dates            = n(),
    mean_TPF           = mean(TPF, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prot_detected = mean(N_prot_detected, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_dates >= min_valid_dates_per_species,
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_TPF),
    mean_TPF > 0,
    mean_TPF < 1,
    is.finite(mean_prot_detected),
    mean_prot_detected > 0,
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z      = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    n_dates_z           = scale_z(n_dates),
    log_prot_detected_z = scale_z(log1p(mean_prot_detected))
  )

############################################################
# 5) BUILD SPECIES-LEVEL BRAY-CURTIS DATA
############################################################
# Bray-Curtis is calculated from transporter-only KEGG
# profiles. For each species, retained dates are ordered, and
# dissimilarity is computed only between adjacent dates in
# that filtered sequence. No explicit minimum-transition
# filter is applied.

analysis_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  semi_join(retained_species, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(TrophicGroupPlot = recode_plot_group(Group_For_Plots)) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Group_For_Plots, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Species_ID, Date)

prot_counts <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

analysis_species_dates <- analysis_species_dates %>%
  left_join(prot_counts, by = c("Species_ID", "Date"))

kegg_sd_trans <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(KEGG_ID),
    !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory),
    str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    kegg_abund = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(kegg_abund), kegg_abund > 0)

compute_species_transitions_bc <- function(sp_id, keep_tbl, kegg_tbl) {

  dates_tbl <- keep_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id) %>%
    arrange(Date)

  dates <- dates_tbl$Date
  if (length(dates) < 2) return(NULL)

  mat_wide <- kegg_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date %in% dates) %>%
    mutate(Date_chr = as.character(Date)) %>%
    select(Date_chr, KEGG_ID, kegg_abund) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = KEGG_ID,
      values_from = kegg_abund,
      values_fill = 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(Date_chr)

  if (nrow(mat_wide) < 2 || ncol(mat_wide) < 2) return(NULL)

  present_dates_chr <- mat_wide$Date_chr
  present_dates <- as.Date(present_dates_chr)

  M_abs <- as.matrix(mat_wide %>% select(-Date_chr))
  rownames(M_abs) <- present_dates_chr

  # Consecutive pairs are defined within the filtered retained
  # date sequence, not by strict calendar adjacency.
  pair_tbl <- tibble(
    Date1 = present_dates[-length(present_dates)],
    Date2 = present_dates[-1]
  )

  out <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_tbl)), function(i) {
    d1 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date1[i])
    d2 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date2[i])

    bc_abs <- as.numeric(
      vegan::vegdist(
        M_abs[c(d1, d2), , drop = FALSE],
        method = "bray"
      )
    )

    nd1 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == as.Date(d1)) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    nd2 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == as.Date(d2)) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    tibble(
      Species_ID  = sp_id,
      Date1       = as.Date(d1),
      Date2       = as.Date(d2),
      bc_abs      = bc_abs,
      N_prot_pair = mean(c(nd1, nd2), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  })

  bind_rows(out)
}

all_species <- sort(unique(analysis_species_dates$Species_ID))

transitions <- bind_rows(lapply(
  all_species,
  compute_species_transitions_bc,
  keep_tbl = analysis_species_dates,
  kegg_tbl = kegg_sd_trans
)) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>%
      distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(bc_abs),
    is.finite(N_prot_pair),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  )

species_bc_df <- transitions %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_transitions  = n(),
    mean_bc_abs    = mean(bc_abs, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prot_pair = mean(N_prot_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_bc_abs),
    mean_bc_abs >= 0,
    mean_bc_abs <= 1,
    is.finite(mean_prot_pair),
    mean_prot_pair > 0,
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_bc_abs_logit = logit_bounded(mean_bc_abs, eps = eps),
    TrophicIndex_z    = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    log_prot_pair_z   = scale_z(log1p(mean_prot_pair))
  )

############################################################
# 6) TROPHIC-INDEX COVERAGE DATA
############################################################

coverage_df <- retained_species %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  mutate(TrophicGroupPlot = recode_plot_group(Group_For_Plots)) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot)
  ) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroupPlot)

############################################################
# 7) FIT PRIMARY SPECIES-LEVEL MODELS
############################################################
# These are the primary cross-species models whose fitted mean
# relationships are shown in the figure.

m_tpf <- glmmTMB(
  mean_TPF ~ TrophicIndex_z + n_dates_z + log_prot_detected_z + (1 | Phylum),
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  data = species_tpf_df
)

m_bc <- glmmTMB(
  mean_bc_abs_logit ~ TrophicIndex_z + log_prot_pair_z + (1 | Phylum),
  family = gaussian(),
  data = species_bc_df
)

############################################################
# 8) BUILD MODEL-IMPLIED PREDICTIONS
############################################################
# Predictions are generated across the observed trophic-index
# range while holding non-focal covariates at their sample means.
# Random effects are excluded so the fitted curves represent the
# population-level fixed-effect trend.

pred_tpf <- tibble(
  TrophicIndex = seq(
    min(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 300
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z      = (TrophicIndex - mean(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                          sd(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_dates_z           = 0,
    log_prot_detected_z = 0
  )

pred_tpf$fit <- predict(
  m_tpf,
  newdata = pred_tpf,
  type = "response",
  re.form = NA
)

pred_bc <- tibble(
  TrophicIndex = seq(
    min(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 300
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z  = (TrophicIndex - mean(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                      sd(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    log_prot_pair_z = 0
  )

pred_bc$fit_logit <- predict(
  m_bc,
  newdata = pred_bc,
  type = "response",
  re.form = NA
)

pred_bc <- pred_bc %>%
  mutate(
    fit_bc_raw = inv_logit(fit_logit)
  )

############################################################
# 9) EXTRACT MODEL SUMMARY STATISTICS
############################################################

fix_tpf <- extract_fixed_effect(m_tpf, "TrophicIndex_z")
fix_bc  <- extract_fixed_effect(m_bc,  "TrophicIndex_z")

r2_tpf <- r2_nakagawa(m_tpf)
r2_bc  <- r2_nakagawa(m_bc)

model_table_raw <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    Response         = "Mean TPF",
    Level            = "Species",
    Family           = "Beta (logit)",
    `Fixed effects`  = "Trophic index + n dates + mean detection depth",
    `Random effects` = "(1 | Phylum)",
    N                = nrow(species_tpf_df),
    `TI estimate`    = fix_tpf$estimate,
    `TI SE`          = fix_tpf$std_error,
    `TI p`           = fix_tpf$p_value,
    `Marginal R2`    = safe_numeric(r2_tpf$R2_marginal),
    `Conditional R2` = safe_numeric(r2_tpf$R2_conditional),
    `Key conclusion` = "Transporter allocation declines with increasing trophic index."
  ),
  tibble(
    Response         = "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis",
    Level            = "Species",
    Family           = "Gaussian on logit scale",
    `Fixed effects`  = "Trophic index + mean pairwise detection depth",
    `Random effects` = "(1 | Phylum)",
    N                = nrow(species_bc_df),
    `TI estimate`    = fix_bc$estimate,
    `TI SE`          = fix_bc$std_error,
    `TI p`           = fix_bc$p_value,
    `Marginal R2`    = safe_numeric(r2_bc$R2_marginal),
    `Conditional R2` = safe_numeric(r2_bc$R2_conditional),
    `Key conclusion` = "Transporter variability increases with increasing trophic index."
  )
)

model_table_csv <- model_table_raw %>%
  mutate(
    `TI estimate`    = signif(`TI estimate`, 3),
    `TI SE`          = signif(`TI SE`, 3),
    `TI p`           = signif(`TI p`, 3),
    `Marginal R2`    = signif(`Marginal R2`, 3),
    `Conditional R2` = signif(`Conditional R2`, 3)
  )

write.csv(
  model_table_csv,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_ModelTable_primary_species_models.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

############################################################
# 10) FIGURE PANEL A — TROPHIC-INDEX COVERAGE
############################################################

p_a <- ggplot(coverage_df, aes(x = TrophicIndex, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 22,
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.25,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "A. Trophic-index coverage",
    subtitle = paste0("Retained species (n = ", nrow(coverage_df), ")"),
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Species [n]"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

############################################################
# 11) FIGURE PANEL B — TPF WITH PRIMARY MODEL FIT
############################################################

p_b <- ggplot(
  species_tpf_df,
  aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = mean_TPF, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    colour = "black",
    size = 2.3,
    stroke = 0.3,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_tpf,
    aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = fit),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.0,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  geom_rug(
    aes(x = TrophicIndex),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    data = species_tpf_df,
    sides = "b",
    alpha = 0.20,
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = range(coverage_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    ylim = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Transporter proteome fraction",
    subtitle = paste0("Species means with fitted beta-model response (n = ", nrow(species_tpf_df), ")"),
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Mean transporter proteome fraction"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

############################################################
# 12) FIGURE PANEL C — BRAY-CURTIS WITH PRIMARY MODEL FIT
############################################################

p_c <- ggplot(
  species_bc_df,
  aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = mean_bc_abs, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    colour = "black",
    size = 2.3,
    stroke = 0.3,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_bc,
    aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = fit_bc_raw),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.0,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  geom_rug(
    aes(x = TrophicIndex),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    data = species_bc_df,
    sides = "b",
    alpha = 0.20,
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = range(coverage_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    ylim = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "C. Bray-Curtis dissimilarity",
    subtitle = paste0("Species means with fitted Gaussian-model response (n = ", nrow(species_bc_df), ")"),
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Mean transporter Bray–Curtis dissimilarity"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

############################################################
# 13) COMBINE MODEL FIGURE — ONE ROW, THREE COLUMNS
############################################################

p_a_row <- p_a + labs(
  subtitle = paste0("Retained species (n = ", nrow(coverage_df), ")")
)

p_b_row <- p_b + labs(
  subtitle = paste0(
    "Fitted beta-model mean response (n = ",
    nrow(species_tpf_df), ")"
  )
)

p_c_row <- p_c + labs(
  subtitle = paste0(
    "Fitted Gaussian-model mean response (n = ",
    nrow(species_bc_df), ")"
  )
)

supp_model_fig <- (p_a_row | p_b_row | p_c_row) +
  plot_layout(
    ncol = 3,
    widths = c(0.9, 1, 1),
    guides = "collect"
  ) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )

print(supp_model_fig)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_ModelFigure_primary_species_models_row.png"),
  plot = supp_model_fig,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = dpi_out,
  bg = "white"
)

############################################################
# 14) RENDERED SUPPLEMENTARY MODEL TABLE
############################################################
# Model attributes are arranged in rows and the two primary
# models are arranged in columns.

model_table_portrait <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Response",
    "Family",
    "Fixed effects",
    "Random effects",
    "N",
    "Trophic-index estimate",
    "Trophic-index SE",
    "Trophic-index p",
    "Marginal R²",
    "Conditional R²",
    "Key conclusion"
  ),
  `TPF model` = c(
    "Mean TPF",
    "Beta (logit)",
    "Trophic index + n dates + mean species protein recovery",
    "(1 | Phylum)",
    as.character(model_table_raw$N[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI estimate`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI SE`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"], 3),
    fmt_p(model_table_raw$`TI p`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Marginal R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Conditional R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"], 3),
    model_table_raw$`Key conclusion`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean TPF"]
  ),
  `Bray-Curtis model` = c(
    "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis",
    "Gaussian on logit scale",
    "Trophic index + Mean species protein recovery (paired consecutive dates)",
    "(1 | Phylum)",
    as.character(model_table_raw$N[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI estimate`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI SE`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    fmt_p(model_table_raw$`TI p`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Marginal R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Conditional R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    model_table_raw$`Key conclusion`[model_table_raw$Response == "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis"]
  )
)

write.csv(
  model_table_portrait,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_ModelTable_primary_species_models_portrait.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

model_table_gt <- model_table_portrait %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Primary species-level model summary**"),
    subtitle = "Mixed models relating trophic index to transporter allocation and variability"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = Metric
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(`TPF model`, `Bray-Curtis model`)
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Metric = "",
    `TPF model` = "TPF (beta)",
    `Bray-Curtis model` = "Bray–Curtis (Gaussian)"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Metric ~ px(260),
    `TPF model` ~ px(330),
    `Bray-Curtis model` ~ px(330)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(10.5),
    data_row.padding = px(6),
    column_labels.font.size = px(10.5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(13),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(10),
    source_notes.font.size = px(9),
    table.width = px(1050)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md(
      "Trophic-index estimates are standardized fixed-effect coefficients from the primary species-level models. Marginal R² denotes variance explained by fixed effects alone, whereas conditional R² includes both fixed and random effects."
    )
  )

print(model_table_gt)

gtsave(
  model_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_ModelTable_primary_species_models_portrait.png"),
  vwidth = 1200,
  vheight = 1500
)

gtsave(
  model_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Supp_ModelTable_primary_species_models_portrait.html")
)
```
